Package org.jscience.social.history.calendars

package org.jscience.social.history.calendars
Historical and alternate calendar systems for chronological calculations.

This package provides implementations of various historical and cultural calendar systems, allowing conversion between different chronological frameworks. Each calendar extends AlternateCalendar which provides common operations like addition, subtraction, and conversion to/from Julian Day and Rata Die representations.

Included Calendar Systems:

  • Gregorian - The internationally accepted civil calendar
  • Julian - The predecessor to the Gregorian calendar
  • Islamic (Hijri) - The lunar calendar used in Muslim countries
  • Hebrew (Jewish) - The lunisolar calendar for Jewish observances
  • Chinese - The traditional lunisolar Chinese calendar
  • Persian (Solar Hijri) - The solar calendar used in Iran and Afghanistan
  • Coptic - Used by the Coptic Orthodox Church
  • Ethiopian - The official calendar of Ethiopia
  • French Republican - The decimal calendar of the French Revolution
  • BahÃ¡'Ã­ - The calendar of the BahÃ¡'Ã­ Faith
  • Mayan - The ancient Mesoamerican calendar system
  • ISO - ISO 8601 week-date calendar

Original implementations based on code by Mark E. Shoulson.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Mark E. Shoulson (original implementations), Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Class
    Description
    AlternateCalendar
    Abstract base class for alternate (non-Gregorian) calendar systems.
    ArrayEnumeration<E>
    An Enumeration implementation that wraps an array.
    BahaiCalendar
    Implementation of the BahÃ¡'Ã­ (BadÃ­') calendar.
    CalendarCoordinate
    A temporal coordinate based on an AlternateCalendar system.
    ChineseCalendar
    Implementation of the traditional Chinese lunisolar calendar.
    CopticCalendar
    Implementation of the Coptic calendar.
    EthiopicCalendar
    Implementation of the Ethiopian calendar.
    FrenchCalendar
    Implementation of the French Republican Calendar (astronomical version).
    GregorianCalendar
    Implementation of the proleptic Gregorian calendar.
    HebrewCalendar
    Implementation of the Hebrew (Jewish) calendar.
    InconsistentDateException
    Exception thrown when a calendar date is inconsistent or invalid.
    IslamicCalendar
    Implementation of the Islamic (Hijri) calendar using the tabular arithmetic method.
    ISOCalendar
    Implementation of the ISO 8601 week-date calendar.
    JulianCalendar
    Implementation of the proleptic Julian calendar.
    MayanCalendar
    Implementation of the Mayan calendar system.
    ModifiedFrenchCalendar
    Implementation of the French Republican Calendar (modified version).
    ModifiedHinduLunarBRCalendar
    Modified Hindu Lunar calendar using arbitrary-precision arithmetic.
    ModifiedHinduLunarCalendar
    Modified Hindu Lunar calendar using floating-point arithmetic.
    ModifiedHinduSolarBRCalendar
    Modified Hindu Solar calendar using arbitrary-precision arithmetic.
    ModifiedHinduSolarCalendar
    Modified Hindu Solar calendar using floating-point arithmetic.
    Moment
    Astronomical calculations for calendar systems.
    MonthDayYear
    Abstract base class for calendar systems that use a month-day-year date representation.
    OldHinduLunarCalendar
    Implementation of the Old Hindu Lunar calendar (Surya Siddhanta). * @version 2.1
    OldHinduSolarCalendar
    Implementation of the Old Hindu Solar calendar (Surya Siddhanta). * @version 2.1
    PersianCalendar
    Implementation of the Persian (Solar Hijri) calendar.
    SevenDaysWeek
    Abstract base class for calendar systems that use a seven-day week.
